title: Receive notification when specific items are created throughout the account
excerpt:

posts.author: pjahnmatz (Peter Alf Jahnmatz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

Is it possible to create an automation that sends me an notice when a column item is created in another board with same name an item from another board?

For instance:

In Board 1, I have a column called Customers, here I have an item called Customer X

In Board 2, someone creates a new item in another Column that is called Customer X

Is it possible for me to automate so that I get a notification when that item called Customer X is created in Board 2 since I have it in Board 1?

Thanks!

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @pjahnmatz - There is nothing in monday․com currently that can watch for a certain item name. However, you can do this with Integromat.

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
